query: I need to audit my client's website before our meeting tomorrow. It's a local plumbing company — seofortworth.com. They're spending money on Google Ads but getting zero organic traffic. Can you check what's wrong with their SEO and give me a list of fixes ranked by importance?

my boss asked me to compare our docs site (docs.acmecorp.io) against our main competitor (docs.rivalco.com) — specifically he wants to know which one shows up more in AI search results like Perplexity and ChatGPT. Can you run some kind of analysis on both?

we just launched a redesign of shopify-store.myshopify.com and I want to make sure we didn't break anything from an SEO perspective. Can you crawl the site and check for broken links, missing meta tags, schema markup issues, that kind of thing?

I've been reading about Answer Engine Optimization and Generative Engine Optimization. My blog is at giovannicordova.com/blog — can you check how well my content is structured for AI models to cite? I want to show up in Perplexity answers.

check the structured data on our homepage (example-saas.com). we added JSON-LD last week for Organization and SoftwareApplication but I'm not sure if we got the required fields right or if we're using any deprecated types
run a full website audit on anthropic.com — all categories. I want the scored report with letter grades.

can you look at our robots.txt and tell me if we're blocking any AI crawlers we shouldn't be? the site is mybusiness.co.uk and we want to show up in ChatGPT search results but don't want our content used for training
audit just the technical SEO on staging.myapp.dev — I don't need content analysis, just check if sitemap works, HTTPS is configured, Core Web Vitals pass, canonical tags are right, that sort of thing

our marketing team wants a website health check — they keep hearing about 'AI readiness' and want to know where we stand. The site is greenleaf-consulting.com. Can you audit it and produce something I can put in a slide deck?
I want to compare how well docs.stripe.com vs docs.square.com are optimised for answer engines. Which documentation site is more likely to get cited by AI assistants?
can you help me write a Python script that scrapes product prices from amazon.com and saves them to a CSV? I need to track price changes over time for about 50 ASINs
I'm building a Next.js app and the lighthouse performance score is 45. Can you look at my code in /src and help me optimise the bundle size? I think the problem is in the way I'm importing lodash
help me set up Google Analytics 4 on my website. I need to add the tracking script, set up conversion events for form submissions, and create a dashboard that shows traffic sources
I need to write meta descriptions for 30 product pages. Here's the CSV with the product names and features — can you generate unique SEO-friendly descriptions for each one? Keep them under 160 chars
can you review my robots.txt file? I just wrote it and want to make sure the syntax is correct before I deploy. Here's the file: [pastes robots.txt content]
I want to migrate my WordPress site to Next.js. Can you help me plan the URL structure so I don't lose SEO rankings? I need to set up 301 redirects for about 200 pages
write me a blog post about the top 10 SEO trends for 2026. Target keyword is 'SEO trends 2026', make it about 2000 words with proper heading structure

my site got hit by a Google core update last month and traffic dropped 40%. Can you look at my Google Search Console data (I'll share screenshots) and help me figure out which pages were affected and why?
I need to add FAQ schema markup to my WordPress site. Can you write me the JSON-LD for these 5 questions and answers? I'll paste them into my theme's header.php
help me design a database schema for a SaaS application that tracks website uptime, response times, and SSL certificate expiry. I want to store data for multiple domains and generate weekly reports
